# MPP32

> Universal payment proxy for machine-payable APIs. All endpoints accept 5 payment protocols: Tempo (pathUSD), x402 (USDC on Solana), ACP, AP2, and AGTP. Providers register once — every protocol works automatically.

## Solana Token Intelligence Oracle

- [POST /api/intelligence](https://mpp32.org/api/intelligence): Returns alpha score, rug risk, whale activity, market data, and social signals for any Solana token. $0.008 per query.

## API Proxy Marketplace

- [GET /api/agent/services](https://mpp32.org/api/agent/services): Browse the federated catalog of 4500+ machine-payable services (native + curated free + x402-bazaar + MCP-registry). Filters: `category`, `q`, `source`, `limit`. Set `X-Agent-Key` for full access and dashboard tracking.
- [GET /api/submissions](https://mpp32.org/api/submissions): Native MPP32 services only (the subset registered through /build). Returns name, slug, category, price, and payment address.
- [POST /api/agent/execute](https://mpp32.org/api/agent/execute): Single endpoint to call any HTTP-callable service in the catalog. Wraps the 402 challenge in a 200 response so simple agents can detect `data.result.error.code === 'PAYMENT_REQUIRED'`. Requires `X-Agent-Key`.
- [POST /api/proxy/{slug}](https://mpp32.org/api/proxy): Direct payment-gated proxy to any native listed service. Accepts all 5 payment protocols.
- [GET /api/proxy/{slug}/info](https://mpp32.org/api/proxy): Public metadata for any listed service (no payment required).

## Discovery

- [OpenAPI Spec](https://mpp32.org/openapi.json): Full OpenAPI 3.1 spec with x-payment-info extensions for automated agent discovery.
- [Agent Card](https://mpp32.org/.well-known/agent.json): A2A agent-to-agent discovery card.
- [MCP Config](https://mpp32.org/api/mcp-config): Model Context Protocol server configuration.
- [Health Check](https://mpp32.org/health): Server status and database connectivity.

## Payment Protocols

| Protocol | Header | Network |
|----------|--------|---------|
| Tempo | WWW-Authenticate / Authorization: Payment | pathUSD on Ethereum L2 |
| x402 | Payment-Required / X-Payment | USDC on Solana |
| ACP | X-ACP-Requirements / X-ACP-Session | Agent Commerce Protocol |
| AP2 | X-AP2-Mandate | W3C Verifiable Credentials (ECDSA P-256) |
| AGTP | Agent-ID | Agent Transfer Protocol |

## Integration

Install the SDK or MCP server:

```
npm install mpp32          # TypeScript SDK
npx mpp32-mcp-server       # MCP server for AI agents
```

The 402 flow: Send request -> receive payment challenge -> pay via any protocol -> retry with authorization -> receive data.

## Builder Platform

API providers can list their own services on MPP32:
- Submit your HTTP endpoint, set your price, receive 100% of payments directly to your wallet
- [Build Page](https://mpp32.org/build): Submit a new service
- [Ecosystem](https://mpp32.org/ecosystem): Browse all listed services

## Links

- Website: https://mpp32.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/MPP32/MPP32
- mppx SDK: https://github.com/wevm/mppx
